description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a predominantly white upper, featuring bold black accents including a large arrow motif on the side and black laces. The midsole is decorated with diagonal black stripes on the heel and a striking orange section on the lateral side. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue, providing extra ankle support and comfort. The outsole appears to be made of rubber, with a textured pattern for grip, and the upper is likely constructed from leather or synthetic leather. The overall design is modern and urban, with a mix of utilitarian and fashion-forward elements. The shoe shows minimal signs of wear, maintaining a clean and structured appearance.
description: A high-top white sneaker with black arrow detailing, black laces, and bold striped and orange accents on the midsole. The shoe is clean, structured, and designed for urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black arrow motif, black laces, and diagonal black stripes on the heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded collar and the striped heel section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the orange midsole accent and black laces.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the black laces, perforated toe box, and padded tongue.
